requirement: 生成一个保护北极熊的宣传网页

template_context.shared_plan_summary: Cycle 2: Refactoring to simple static HTML/CSS website as per remediation requirement, removing Tailwind CSS dependency to align with original architecture.

interface_highlights.name: HTML Structure
interface_highlights.description: Semantic HTML5 document with header, main, footer, and content sections

interface_highlights.name: CSS Styling
interface_highlights.description: External stylesheet for responsive design, typography, and visual presentation

interface_highlights.name: Asset Management
interface_highlights.description: Directory structure for images and other media assets

architecture_decisions: {"decision": "Use static HTML/CSS approach", "rationale": "Simple, fast-loading, and meets all acceptance criteria without complexity"}
{"decision": "Implement mobile-first responsive design", "rationale": "Ensures accessibility across all devices from the start"}
{"decision": "Separate content (HTML), presentation (CSS), and assets", "rationale": "Clean separation of concerns for maintainability and clarity"}
